Package nonprofitbookkeeping.model

Class CurrentCompany

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.model.CurrentCompany
public class CurrentCompany extends Object
Manages the currently active Company instance in the application. This class provides static methods to access, load, save, and manage the state of the company data, including its associated file and open status. It also handles listeners for company state changes.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListener
    Listener interface for receiving notifications about company state changes (e.g., opened or closed).
    static class 
    CurrentCompany.CompanyListener
    Manages a list of CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListeners and fires events to them.

  • Constructor Details

    • CurrentCompany

      public CurrentCompany()
      Constructs a CurrentCompany manager. Initializes a new, empty Company object and sets the company as not open. Note: While this constructor exists, the class primarily uses static members. Instantiating CurrentCompany might reset the static company instance if not handled carefully.

  • Method Details

    • getCompany

      public static Company getCompany()
      Gets the currently active Company instance.
      Returns:
      The current company. Can be a newly initialized company if none has been loaded.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of the CurrentCompany's state, including the current file and whether a company is open.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      A string describing the current company state.

    • persist

      public static void persist() throws IOException
      Persists the current company data to the database using the CompanyRepository. When the company has not yet been saved a new row is created and its identifier is tracked for subsequent saves.
      Throws:
      IOException - if serialization or the database write fails

    • loadFromPersistent

      public static void loadFromPersistent(long companyId) throws IOException
      Loads company data from the database and makes it the current active company.
      Parameters:
      companyId - identifier of the stored company
      Throws:
      IOException - if the company cannot be retrieved or deserialized

    • close

      public static void close()
      Closes the currently open company. Sets the company open status to false and notifies listeners. Does not clear the company data or current file itself, only marks as closed.

    • isOpen

      public static boolean isOpen()
      Checks if a company is currently considered open.
      Returns:
      true if a company is open, false otherwise.

    • markCompanyOpen

      public static void markCompanyOpen()
      Marks the current company as open and notifies listeners.

      This method does not load any company data. It merely updates the "company is open" flag and fires a change event so that UI panels can refresh themselves. It is typically called after the company has been loaded from disk.

    • forceCompanyLoad

      public static void forceCompanyLoad(Company company2)
      For test environments or specialized workflows where the caller needs to directly set the current Company and immediately notify all CurrentCompany.CompanyChangeListeners, this helper provides that ability.

      If company2 is null the current company reference is cleared and listeners are notified as if the company was closed. Otherwise the provided company becomes the active company and listeners are notified that a company is open.

      Parameters:
      company2 - the company to set as the current one, or null to simulate closing the current company

    • refreshFromPersistentData

      public static void refreshFromPersistentData() throws IOException
      Refreshes the active company with the latest chart of accounts and journal transactions from the normalized database tables. This keeps in-memory models aligned with database mutations (such as ledger imports) and triggers UI listeners so panels can refresh immediately.
      Throws:
      IOException - if the normalized tables cannot be read

    • forceCompanyLoad

      public static void forceCompanyLoad(Long companyId, Company company2)
      Convenience helper that sets both the active company identifier and the aggregate.

    • getCurrentCompanyId

      public static Long getCurrentCompanyId()
      Returns the identifier of the currently open company, or null if unsaved.
